turns.user_message: I tried to shake it off today, but it didn't work. I just feel wound up and on edge.
My chest gets tight every time I try to relax lately. I can't remember the last time I felt truly calm.
I feel like I'm constantly braced for something awful to happen. It's exhausting to live with this much tension all the time.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better. This has been going on for a while.
